title: Chat
description: Talk to our team and get support in real time.

profile_required_footer: Complete your profile to send messages.

perms.perm_create_groups_desc: Workers can create their own chat groups
perms.perm_create_channels_desc: Can create new public or private channels
perms.perm_post_announcements_desc: Can post messages in announcement channels
perms.perm_upload_media_desc: Can attach images, videos, and files
perms.perm_invite_members_desc: Can invite new people to their groups
perms.perm_pin_messages_desc: Can pin important messages in channels
perms.color_desc: Tags and avatars for this section
perms.empty_desc: Select a section in the sidebar to manage its privileges.
